sentence_reviews.text: Batching and admission control combine requests, assign accelerator time, enforce priorities, and balance latency, throughput, fairness, and memory pressure.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: DDIA supports batching, scheduling, backpressure/load, and distributed service tradeoffs; accelerator memory pressure and GPU scheduling are synthesized beyond the cited source.
sentence_reviews.notes: Core scheduling/batching concept is supported; GPU-specific details need an inference serving or GPU scheduler source.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Batching, admission control & GPU scheduling is to connect Model servers & inference runtimes, Distributed systems & networking to downstream capabilities including Paged attention & KV-memory management, Fault tolerance, security, energy & cost optimization.
